creator: hideo@lastamericanempire.com
text:
SABnzbd only works with python2.5 and lower. Also, due to the version
of devel/py-cheetah in ports, it won't work unless the api key feature
introduced in v0.4.9 is disabled in the user's ini file. This *may*
expose a user to the vulnerability described here:

	http://sabnzbd.wikidot.com/cross-site-vulnerability/  

Changes:
	* Restrict to python2.5 and lower
	* Bump PORTREVISION as python2.6 installs are broken
	* Change dependency on devel/py-celementtree for python2.4 only
	* Add pkg-message about api error and vulnerability
